title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Army Act, 1950. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint in this behalf.
footnote: 1. 22nd July, 1950, vide notification No. S.R.0 120, dated the 22nd July, 1950, see Gazette of India, Part II, s. 4.
